Manually assigns a volume number to a API.Schema.SeriesContext.Chapter.
Passing null clears the volume assignment and confidence.

requestBody.description: Volume number to assign (null to clear)

Returns a 200×300 JPEG preview thumbnail of the first page of the chapter archive.
The thumbnail is generated lazily and cached at `{AppData}/previews/{chapter.Key}.jpg`.

get.summary: Returns all API.Controllers.DTOs.FileLibrary
Returns API.Controllers.DTOs.FileLibrary with FileLibraryId

post.summary: Enqueues a job. The type must be in the handler registry (trust boundary).

get.summary: All runtime jobs.
Rollup of runtime jobs by status (AF6a) — drives the queue badge/overview.
A single runtime job by id.

post.summary: Re-queues a API.Schema.JobsContext.JobStatus.NeedsAttention job, resetting its attempts.

412.description: The job is not in NeedsAttention.

post.summary:
Cancels a job. A Queued job is cancelled immediately; a Running job is signalled to stop
            cooperatively — the dispatcher records it Cancelled once the handler honours the token.

202.description: A running job was signalled to cancel.

post.summary:
Dismisses (deletes) a job the user has acknowledged — e.g. clearing a NeedsAttention job.
            An active (Queued/Running) job must be cancelled first.

412.description: The job is still active; cancel it instead.

get.summary:
Returns a dashboard of manga with unresolved chapters or missing files.
Unresolved: Downloaded == true && VolumeNumber == null.
Missing: Downloaded == true && FileName == null.
Only manga with FileLibraryId != null are included.

200.description: Dashboard result; manga list may be empty

get.summary: Gets all configured API.Controllers.DTOs.LibraryConnector
Returns API.Controllers.DTOs.LibraryConnector with LibraryConnectorId

post.summary: Removes all API.Schema.SeriesContext.Series not marked for Download on any !:SeriesSource
Removes all API.Schema.ActionsContext.ActionRecord
Enqueues a Cleanup (OrphanedFiles) job to remove files from the library that are not tracked in the database.

parameters.name: dryRun
parameters.description: If true, only log what would be deleted without actually deleting it.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description:
If true, bypass the safety guards that skip wiping an untracked library or
            deleting a majority of a library's archives. Use only for a deliberate bulk cleanup.

post.summary: Enqueues a ResolveSeriesVolumes job for each series with unresolved chapter volumes.
Enqueues a PlaceChapterFile job for each chapter whose stored filename no longer matches the current naming scheme.
Clears all chapter volume numbers and enqueues ResolveSeriesVolumes jobs to re-resolve them from scratch.

200.description: Volumes cleared and resolve worker queued

post.summary:
Queues an immediate chapter sync + cover refresh for each of the series' sources (preferring the
enabled ones) — the manual "sync now" trigger.

412.description: The series has no source links to sync from

post.summary:
Re-matches a series' source link to a different entry on the same connector — the repair step
when a stored id is wrong and syncs fail or yield nothing. The link is replaced (its key derives
from the site id), the download preference carries over, and a fresh chapter sync is queued.

404.description: Series or source link not found, or the link belongs to another series

get.summary: Gets the Chapter Naming Scheme
get.description:
Placeholders:
%M Obj Name
%V Volume
%C Chapter
%T Title
%A Author (first in list)
%I Chapter Internal ID
%i Obj Internal ID
%Y Year (Obj)
            
?_(...) replace _ with a value from above:
Everything inside the braces will only be added if the value of %_ is not null

patch.description:
Placeholders:
%M Obj Name
%V Volume
%C Chapter
%T Title
%A Author (first in list)
%Y Year (Obj)
            
?_(...) replace _ with a value from above:
Everything inside the braces will only be added if the value of %_ is not null

Stores the layout preference and returns a reorganize preview using the new layout.
Does NOT execute any file moves.

200.description: Layout stored; response includes reorganize preview with new layout paths

post.summary:
Bulk-assigns chapter numbers to volume numbers for a manga.
Chapters not found are listed in the response; the request is not failed.
Also marks MetadataSource as Manual/Confirmed on the manga.

200.description: Assignment applied; returns count of applied and list of not-found chapter numbers

post.summary: Enqueues a ReconcileVolumeBundle job to merge all unbundled chapters into a single CBZ.

409.description: No unbundled chapters with files to bundle

delete.summary: Enqueues a ReconcileVolumeBundle (Unbundle) job to split the bundle CBZ back into chapter CBZs.

202.description: Worker queued; returns job ID (may include warning if no map exists)

AcquisitionKind.description:
How a connector turns a Chapter into a .cbz on disk. Each SeriesSource declares one kind;
ChapterDownloadService uses the kind to dispatch to the matching IChapterAcquirer.

chapterCount.description: Chapters the connector reported if Record is API.Schema.ActionsContext.Actions.ChaptersRetrievedActionRecord

totalPages.description: The total number of pages (max page)

totalCount.description: The total number of entries for this request

BundleJobResult.description: Result returned when a bundle/unbundle job is queued.

mangaId.description: Identifier of the Series this Chapter belongs to

sourceIds.description: Ids of the Series on MangaConnectors

ChapterFileEntry.description: Per-chapter entry in a volume listing.

totalPages.description: The total number of pages (max page)

totalCount.description: The total number of entries for this request

volumeNumber.description: Volume the connector assigns this chapter to, if any.

ChapterPreview.description:
A chapter as reported live by a connector, before anything is saved — what the add flow
            shows so 'this source yields 0 chapters' is visible while a different source can still be picked.

objId.description: Key of the referenced object (series or chapter)

idOnConnectorSite.description: ID of the object on the connector site

websiteUrl.description: Website Link for reference, if any

useForDownload.description: Whether this Link is used for downloads

ChapterSourceId.description:
API.Controllers.DTOs.SourceId`1 DTO. Field names mirror the schema entity exactly — ObjId is the key of
            the referenced object, IdOnConnectorSite is the object's id on the connector site. (They were
            historically swapped on the wire, which made connector-id bugs invisible.)

name.description: The Name of the Notification Connector

url.description: The Url of the Library instance

apiKey.description: The ApiKey to authenticate to the Library instance

url.description: The Url of the Library instance

apiKey.description: The ApiKey to authenticate to the Library instance

basePath.description: The directory Path of the library

name.description: The Name of the Notification Connector

httpMethod.description: The HTTP Request Method to use for notifications

body.description: The Request Body to use to send notifications

headers.description: The Request Headers to use to send notifications

name.description: The Name of the Notification Connector
The Name of the Notification Connector

DownloadClientResponse.description: A download client without its password.

payload.description: Typed JSON payload for the handler.

dedupKey.description: Coalescing key — a second enqueue with the same key while one is active is a no-op.

EnqueueJobRequest.description: Trigger payload for enqueueing a runtime job. Only a registered API.Controllers.Requests.EnqueueJobRequest.Type is accepted.

basePath.description: The directory Path of the library

FileMove.description: Represents a single file move operation in a reorganize preview.

baseUrl.description: The Url of the Library instance

LibraryRefreshSetting.description: When to trigger an external library (Kavita/Komga) rescan relative to downloads.

coverUrl.description: Url to the cover if available

MetadataSourceCandidate.description: A scored metadata candidate for linking to a local Series.

sourceIds.description: Ids of the Series on MangaConnectors

coverUrl.description: External cover image URL from the connector

fileLibraryId.description: Id of the Library the Series gets downloaded to

name.description: The Name of the Notification Connector

httpMethod.description: The HTTP Request Method to use for notifications

body.description: The Request Body to use to send notifications

headers.description: The Request Headers to use to send notifications

PatchChapterRecord.description: Request body for updating mutable metadata on a Chapter

refreshLibraryWhileDownloadingEveryMinut.description: When API.LibraryRefreshSetting.WhileDownloading is selected, update the time between refreshes

startedAt.description: When the dispatcher began executing the job; null until it starts.

progress.description: Latest progress message from a running job.

QueuedJob.description: A API.Schema.JobsContext.Job in the runtime queue.

minSeeders.description: Releases with fewer seeders are never picked.

preferredTokens.description: Filename tokens that rank a release higher (e.g. cbz).

blockedTokens.description: Filename tokens that exclude a release outright (e.g. cbr, pdf).

ReleaseSelectionRecord.description: How torrent releases are picked for comics (v1 scoring — not arr-style profiles).

idOnConnectorSite.description: The series' id on the connector site (from a connector search result).

websiteUrl.description: The series' page URL on the connector site, if known.

RematchSourceRecord.description: The corrected connector entry a series' source link should point at.

ReorganizeJobResult.description: Result returned after queuing a reorganize job.

ReorganizePreviewResult.description: Dry-run diff for a reorganize operation.

ignoreChaptersBefore.description: Chapter cutoff for Downloads (Chapters before this will not be downloaded)

sourceIds.description: Ids of the Series on MangaConnectors

coverUrl.description: External cover image URL from the connector

fileLibraryId.description: Id of the Library the Series gets downloaded to

wantedChapters.description: Chapters wanted for download (a source link is enabled).

downloadedChapters.description: Wanted chapters already on disk (downloaded or bundled).

lastError.description: Most recent job failure message for this series, if any.

lastSyncAt.description: When chapters were last retrieved from a connector.

lastSyncChapterCount.description: How many chapters the connector reported on the last sync — 0 means 'looked and found none'.

SeriesRollup.description:
Per-series operational rollup: actual download progress, live job counts, and the most recent
failure. This is what the library badge and series page derive their state from — 'Downloading'
means work is actually pending, not merely 'a source is enabled'.

enabled.description: Whether Connector is used for Searches and Downloads

objId.description: Key of the referenced object (series or chapter)

idOnConnectorSite.description: ID of the object on the connector site

websiteUrl.description: Website Link for reference, if any

useForDownload.description: Whether this Link is used for downloads

SeriesSourceId.description:
API.Controllers.DTOs.SourceId`1 DTO. Field names mirror the schema entity exactly — ObjId is the key of
            the referenced object, IdOnConnectorSite is the object's id on the connector site. (They were
            historically swapped on the wire, which made connector-id bugs invisible.)

SetMetronRecord.description: Metron (metron.cloud) account credentials for metadata lookups.

SettingsResponse.description:
Secret-free projection of API.KenkuSettings returned by `GET /v2/Settings`.
Credentials (download-client passwords, indexer API keys, Metron password) are deliberately
omitted — the persistence model keeps them, the API contract does not. API.Controllers.Responses.SettingsResponse.ApiKey (the
Prowlarr push key) is intentionally included because the UI displays it for copying.

SyncedIndexerResponse.description: A synced indexer without its API key.

UnbundleJobResult.description: Result returned when an unbundle job is queued.

UnresolvedMangaEntry.description: Entry for a manga with unresolved chapters or missing files.

VolumeBundleState.description: Where a volume stands with respect to VolumeCBZ bundling.

VolumeEntry.description: One volume with its chapter list and bundling status.
